test.note: Known failure due to missing test files on disk (documented in AGENTS.md as out of scope). Not blocking.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on route handler alias pattern: when an endpoint needs to be accessible both with and without the /v1/ prefix (e.g., for lm-eval compatibility), workers should consider extracting a shared helper function rather than duplicating the entire handler closure. The current approach has ~90 lines of duplicated code across 3 endpoint pairs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lm-eval-integration feature (8cbe98a) introduced /tokenize, /detokenize, /tokenizer_info aliases in OpenAIRoutes.swift. Each alias is a full copy of the original handler, increasing maintenance risk of divergence.

rejectedObservations.observation: lm-eval's local-completions backend strips /v1/completions from base_url and calls tokenizer endpoints at server root
lm-eval sends 'prompt' key instead of 'text' in tokenize requests and reads 'prompt' from detokenize responses
tokenizer_info returns unknownToken as pad_token because Tokenizer protocol doesn't expose padToken
Worker followed swift-backend-worker skill procedure with no deviations
rejectedObservations.reason: confirmation of correct behavior, not an actionable observation
